spec.durationSemantics: wall-clock 10 sec (durationSec:10), refreshed each FB entry
spec.triggerIdentity: fullBurstEnter — 'when entering Full Burst' fires on ANY team FB, including rotations where the co-B3 (helm) bursts, not only privaty's own
spec.targetSet: all allies INCLUDING self ({kind:'allies'}, no excludeSelf)
spec.nearestWrongModel: keyed to burstCast so it only fires on privaty's own burst rotations (halves uptime in a two-B3 comp)
spec.distinguishingAssertion: capture buffApply(stat=atkPct, value=23.61): one apply per fullBurstStart event for EVERY rotation, including rotations whose burstCast srcSlot is helm's; red if applies only follow privaty's burstCast
spec.inertness: no atkPct 23.61 applies outside FB entries; buff gone 10s after each entry

spec.scope: weapon-state (reload duration), all allies — this IS damage: it raises shots fired
spec.triggerIdentity: fullBurstEnter, same block as the ATK line
spec.distinguishingAssertion: withPatchedOverride removing only this effect: total shot-event count for privaty (and reload-window durations inside the 10s FB windows) must DROP vs the full override; green if shipped model shows faster reload completions inside the window
spec.inertness: reload cadence outside the 10s windows identical to baseline (reloadFrames 81)

spec.scope: weapon-state (magazine size), all allies — a DEBUFF on the team that must still be modeled; it halves magazines and DOUBLES last-bullet frequency (feeds privaty's own skill2 riders)
spec.targetSet: all allies including self AND teammates (their reload cadence changes too)
spec.nearestWrongModel: dropped as an anti-synergy/defensive line (or sign-flipped to ▲) because it 'reduces damage'
spec.distinguishingAssertion: inside each 10s FB window privaty's magazine is ~30 rounds not 60: assert her reload/lastBullet events inside the window come at roughly double the out-of-window rate, and that removing this effect via withPatchedOverride REDUCES her skill2 256.17%-mult proc count; red under drop (cadence unchanged) and under sign-flip (procs rarer)
spec.inertness: magazine back to full 60 outside the window; teammates' capacity also restored

spec.scope: 'Attack Damage' = Damage Up bucket (attackDamagePct), ADDITIVE with other support Damage-Up (diluted), not an ATK stat
spec.nearestWrongModel: encoded as a second atkPct buff (wrong bucket — multiplies with the 23.61% ATK line instead of diluting in the shared Damage-Up bucket)
spec.distinguishingAssertion: capture buffApply(stat=attackDamagePct, value=20.16) at FB entry; and per-hit damage mult during the window reflects additive stacking with crown's Damage-Up rather than a separate ATK multiplier; red if a 20.16 atkPct apply appears
spec.inertness: no Damage-Up contribution outside the window

spec.scope: boss DEBUFF (damageTakenPct) benefiting the WHOLE team's damage, not a privaty-only buff
spec.durationSemantics: wall-clock 10 sec, re-applied each magazine end (effectively refreshed if lastBullet interval < 10s)
spec.triggerIdentity: lastBullet — 'when the last bullet hits the target', per-magazine; couples with skill1's ammo cut (windowed cadence doubling)
spec.nearestWrongModel: scoped to self (or encoded as a self attackDamagePct), crediting only privaty instead of every unit hitting the debuffed boss
spec.distinguishingAssertion: capture the boss-held buffApply with casterIdx===null && targetIdx===null, stat=damageTakenPct value=10.01, timestamped at privaty's lastBullet; and toggling the effect off must move TEAMMATES' damage totals (unitOf deltas on liter/crown/helm), not just privaty's; red if only privaty's total moves
spec.inertness: no application on non-final bullets; no apply while privaty is stunned/not firing

spec.kitLine: Deals 256.17% of final ATK as additional
spec.scope: flatDamage rider 256.17% of final ATK; crits at caster rate, NO core, range bonus force-off (noRange), takes FB by landing timing (noFb default OFF)
spec.triggerIdentity: lastBullet (per-magazine), same block as the Damage Taken line — NOT shotFired, NOT interval
spec.nearestWrongModel: keyed to shotFired (≈60× over-credit per magazine) or to an invented interval cadence
spec.distinguishingAssertion: count of damage events with mult 256.17 srcSlot=privaty EQUALS her lastBullet/reload count over the run (≈ shots/magSize), and is far below her shot-event count; during FB windows the per-second proc rate roughly doubles (ammo-cut coupling); red under shotFired (count==shots)
spec.inertness: at most one 256.17 event per magazine; zero while reloading/stunned

spec.kitLine: last bullet hits a target in Designated
spec.scope: flatDamage rider 1687% of final ATK, STATUS-GATED — only while the boss carries 'Designated Target'
spec.durationSemantics: instant hit per qualifying trigger; the gate window is the status's 10s
spec.triggerIdentity: lastBullet + requiresTargetStatus:'Designated Target' (name-keyed gate opened ONLY by privaty's burst targetStatus effect)
spec.nearestWrongModel: ungated lastBullet rider — 1687% fires every magazine all fight (massive over-credit; the classic status-gated-rider trap), or gated on a generic boolean another kit's status could satisfy
spec.distinguishingAssertion: every damage event with mult 1687 must fall within 10s after a privaty burstCast event; assert ZERO 1687 events before her first burst and zero in gaps >10s after a cast; expected count ≈ 2–3 per privaty burst rotation given the ammo-cut cadence; red under ungated (events from t≈5s onward)
spec.inertness: zero 1687 procs while the Designated Target window is closed; removing the burst's targetStatus effect via withPatchedOverride must zero ALL 1687 events

spec.scope: elemAdvantageDamagePct (Damage-Up bucket, active ONLY with elemental advantage) — privaty is Water vs the harness's Fire boss, so this is LIVE in controlComp and stacks beyond the base ×1.10
spec.triggerIdentity: burstCast (self mode inside her OWN burst block) — NOT fullBurstEnter; with helm co-B3 it fires only on privaty's rotations
spec.nearestWrongModel: keyed to fullBurstEnter (over-credits helm-burst rotations), or encoded as generic attackDamagePct/elementDamagePct (would stay live vs a non-advantaged boss)
spec.distinguishingAssertion: buffApply(stat=elemAdvantageDamagePct, value=130, target=privaty) appears ONLY on rotations containing a privaty burstCast, never on helm-only rotations; AND against a non-advantaged boss element the buff contributes zero to her damage mult; red if applies track fullBurstStart or persist vs neutral boss
spec.inertness: no effect on rotations privaty doesn't burst; no effect without elemental advantage; the base ×1.10 advantage multiplier still applies independently

spec.kitLine: Deals 1407.64% of final ATK as Burst
spec.scope: flatDamage 1407.64% Burst Skill damage; crit-eligible at caster rate, no core, noRange
spec.durationSemantics: instant, once per privaty burst cast
spec.triggerIdentity: burstCast — instant burst damage lands BEFORE the FB window opens, so it is FB-exempt (taxonomy #9)
spec.nearestWrongModel: FB major applied (+50%) because the cast 'belongs to' the Full Burst rotation, or double-fired via fullBurstEnter
spec.distinguishingAssertion: the 1407.64-mult damage event has fbMajorApplied===false (and occurs exactly once per privaty burstCast, ~2 per 2-rotation cycle with helm co-B3); red if fbMajorApplied true or count tracks fullBurstStart. Also assert whether the self 130% elem-adv buff (applied same cast) does or does not ride this hit — pin the ordering and note it
spec.inertness: no burst-damage events on helm's rotations

spec.scope: boss control (enemy can't fire/charge/reload) — boss offense is unmodeled in v1, so this is inert
spec.nearestWrongModel: encoding a stun on a friendly target set (would silence an ALLY's firing) or inventing a damage-side effect for it
spec.distinguishingAssertion: no ally's shot cadence changes at privaty's burst cast beyond modeled effects; line appears verbatim in the override's unmodeled.burst; totals identical with/without any stun encoding
spec.inertness: must move ZERO damage on any comp

spec.scope: TWO channels: (1) applies the NAMED status 'Designated Target' to the boss — load-bearing, it is the sole opener for skill2's 1687% gate; (2) boss ATK ▼ 5.02% — defensive, inert in v1 (boss deals no damage) → unmodeled
spec.durationSemantics: status window wall-clock 10 sec (must match the skill2 gate's read window)
spec.triggerIdentity: burstCast → targetStatus {name:'Designated Target', durationSec:10}; validator requires the carrying block authored with target enemy
spec.nearestWrongModel: encoding only the ATK debuff (or dropping the line as defensive) with NO named status emission — skill2's 1687% rider is then dead the entire fight (large under-credit); second-nearest: a generic/boolean status a future second carrier would cross-satisfy
spec.distinguishingAssertion: after each privaty burstCast, the next lastBullet within 10s produces a 1687-mult damage event (proves the window opened, name-keyed); patching out the targetStatus effect zeroes all 1687 events while leaving the 1407.64 nuke intact; the ATK ▼ 5.02% fragment appears in unmodeled.burst
spec.inertness: the status must NOT satisfy any other unit's requiresTargetStatus gate (name-keyed, e.g. never 'Wipe Out'); no window opens on helm's rotations

burst: Designated Target: ATK ▼ 5.02% for 10 sec. (ATK-debuff channel only — the status application itself IS modeled)

notes: Expected shared-prior misreads to force apart: (1) the Max Ammunition ▼ 50.66% dropped as 'anti-synergy/defensive' — it is load-bearing twice over: fewer shots per magazine for the whole team AND doubled lastBullet cadence that feeds BOTH skill2 riders during exactly the windows the 1687% gate can be open; the tests must assert the S1→S2 coupling end-to-end (256.17% proc rate roughly doubles inside FB windows), not just each line in isolation. (2) The 1687% rider shipped ungated — the single largest over-credit risk in this kit; assert zero procs before her first burst. (3) The Designated Target status never emitted (only the ATK▼ read), silently killing the 1687% line — assert via the gated rider firing, and assert name-keying so no other kit's status opens it. (4) Damage Taken ▲ 10.01% mis-scoped as self — verify via the casterIdx===null/targetIdx===null boss-held buffApply AND a teammate-damage delta on toggle. (5) burstCast vs fullBurstEnter divergence is live in controlComp (helm co-B3): skill1 must key to fullBurstEnter (fires on helm rotations too) while the burst self-buff and nuke must key to burstCast (privaty rotations only) — a uniform choice either way is wrong in one direction each. (6) The 1407.64% nuke must be FB-exempt (fbMajorApplied false). (7) The 130% elem-adv line is LIVE vs the Fire control boss (Water advantage) — do not treat it as inert flavor, and do not flatten it to generic Damage-Up (it must die vs a non-advantaged boss). One ordering question the driver must pin explicitly: whether the same-cast 130% self-buff rides the 1407.64% nuke hit. All magnitudes are literal kit text (DATAMINED); the only ⚑-class inputs are the base cadence tuple and the rider noFb defaults, which are convention, not kit prose.
